response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings 17+ years of broad software engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective, but falls significantly short of the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy profile. His AI exposure is limited to a single current role and involves tooling support (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) rather than building or architecting AI products at scale. The role demands recognized AI expertise, deep cloud platform fluency, and the ability to advise strategic customers at a director level — none of which are substantiated in this resume. His career ceiling to date is Staff/Senior individual contributor, well below the director-level IC gravity and external influence this position requires.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the minimum tenure bar
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with real production users, showing product ownership beyond an employer context
Active knowledge sharer through workshops and conference talks (FOSS4G 2019), partially aligning with the role's 'inspire others internally and externally' responsibility
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — confined to MCP tooling and agentic workflow support starting April 2025, with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built and shipped at meaningful scale
No evidence of cloud platform depth or strategic customer advisory experience; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is tactical pricing infrastructure, not cloud architecture or customer-facing strategy
Career titles and trajectory (Senior/Staff Developer) do not reflect the director-level seniority, executive influence, or cross-organizational strategic scope this role requires
